morning: Good morning, {name}! Great to see you.
afternoon: Good afternoon, {name}! How's your day going?
Hi {name}! Good to see you this afternoon.
evening: Good evening, {name}! How was your day?
Hey {name}, evening! Nice to see you.
Evening, {name}! Good to have you back.
night: Good to see you, {name}, even at this hour.
